ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in Celsius */,
  "solar_ghi" REAL /* Solar Global Horizontal Irradiance */,
  "solar_prediction_mw" REAL /* Predicted solar energy generation in megawatts */,
  "wind_prediction_mw" REAL /* Predicted wind energy generation in megawatts */,
  "load_actuals_mw" REAL /* Actual load consumption in megawatts */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of data recording */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the year */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season (1=Winter, 2=Spring, 3=Summer, 4=Fall) */,
  "workdayornot" INTEGER /* Indicator if the day is a workday (1=True, 0=False) */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the site where the data is collected */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "solar_dni" REAL /* Solar Direct Normal Irradiance */,
  "solar_dhi" REAL /* Solar Diffuse Horizontal Irradiance */,
  "load_prediction_mw" REAL /* Predicted load consumption in megawatts */,
  "external_weather_source" TEXT /* Source of external weather data (e.g., API name) */,
  "data_quality_flag" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the data is of high quality (1=True, 0=False) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_lags" (
  "lag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for lag data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding energy data entry */,
  "temperature_lag1" REAL /* Temperature lag 1 hour */,
  "temperature_lag2" REAL /* Temperature lag 2 hours */,
  "temperature_lag3" REAL /* Temperature lag 3 hours */,
  "temperature_lag4" REAL /* Temperature lag 4 hours */,
  "temperature_lag5" REAL /* Temperature lag 5 hours */,
  "temperature_lag6" REAL /* Temperature lag 6 hours */,
  "temperature_lag7" REAL /* Temperature lag 7 hours */,
  "temperature_lag8" REAL /* Temperature lag 8 hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_lags_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "load_lags" (
  "load_lag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for load lag data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding energy data entry */,
  "load_actuals_mw_lag1" REAL /* Load actuals lag 1 hour */,
  "load_actuals_mw_lag2" REAL /* Load actuals lag 2 hours */,
  "load_actuals_mw_lag3" REAL /* Load actuals lag 3 hours */,
  "load_actuals_mw_lag4" REAL /* Load actuals lag 4 hours */,
  "load_actuals_mw_lag5" REAL /* Load actuals lag 5 hours */,
  "load_actuals_mw_lag6" REAL /* Load actuals lag 6 hours */,
  "load_actuals_mw_lag7" REAL /* Load actuals lag 7 hours */,
  "load_actuals_mw_lag8" REAL /* Load actuals lag 8 hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("load_lag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_load_lags_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_lags" (
  "wind_lag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for wind lag data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding energy data entry */,
  "wind_prediction_mw_lag1" REAL /* Wind prediction lag 1 hour */,
  "wind_prediction_mw_lag2" REAL /* Wind prediction lag 2 hours */,
  "wind_prediction_mw_lag3" REAL /* Wind prediction lag 3 hours */,
  "wind_prediction_mw_lag4" REAL /* Wind prediction lag 4 hours */,
  "wind_prediction_mw_lag5" REAL /* Wind prediction lag 5 hours */,
  "wind_prediction_mw_lag6" REAL /* Wind prediction lag 6 hours */,
  "wind_prediction_mw_lag7" REAL /* Wind prediction lag 7 hours */,
  "wind_prediction_mw_lag8" REAL /* Wind prediction lag 8 hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_lag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_lags_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solar_lags" (
  "solar_lag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for solar prediction lag data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding energy data entry */,
  "solar_prediction_mw_lag1" REAL /* Solar prediction lag 1 hour */,
  "solar_prediction_mw_lag2" REAL /* Solar prediction lag 2 hours */,
  "solar_prediction_mw_lag3" REAL /* Solar prediction lag 3 hours */,
  "solar_prediction_mw_lag4" REAL /* Solar prediction lag 4 hours */,
  "solar_prediction_mw_lag5" REAL /* Solar prediction lag 5 hours */,
  "solar_prediction_mw_lag6" REAL /* Solar prediction lag 6 hours */,
  "solar_prediction_mw_lag7" REAL /* Solar prediction lag 7 hours */,
  "solar_prediction_mw_lag8" REAL /* Solar prediction lag 8 hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solar_lag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solar_lags_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., energy analyst, engineer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active (1=True, 0=False) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the request */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the access was successful (1=True, 0=False) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)
